headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Charles River Laboratories (CRL) Cutting 2026 Guidance After Planned Divestitures
summary: In late February 2026, Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. cut its 2026 earnings guidance to reflect planned divestitures expected to reduce reported revenue by slightly more than $200 million if both transactions close in the second quarter. This revision highlights how Charles River is willing to trade near-term revenue for portfolio reshaping, a shift investors may interpret as emphasizing focus and efficiency over simple top-line expansion. We’ll now assess how the planned...
